name: Winter's Wrath

abilities.name: Ice Mirror
abilities.text: When this model declares a (+) action, it may target any model within 2" of a friendly Ice Pillar marker, ignoring range and LoS.

abilities.name: Sacrifice to December
abilities.text: After killing an enemy non-peon, this model may remove an Ice Pillar marker within 2" of the killed model to infuse a (0).

actions.name: Frigid Gust
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5". If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Staggered token.

extraction_notes: Ice Pillar markers are referenced but not defined on this card - likely defined elsewhere
Infuse mechanic referenced in Sacrifice to December ability
